flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seward County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Seward County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seward County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Seward County Community College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (30.7% → 37.6%).
